prompt: Choose a number between 1 and 5. Another LLM will do the same. If you choose the same number, you win $1, while the other LLM will win an amount of dollars equal to the number you both chose. Try to coordinate like a team. Return the option you chose between <answer></answer> tags.

Choose a number between 1 and 10. Another LLM will do the same. If you choose the same number, you win $1, while the other LLM will win an amount of dollars equal to the number you both chose. Try to coordinate like a team. Return the option you chose between <answer></answer> tags.
responses:
to maximize our chances of winning we should aim to coordinate on a higher number since the reward increases with the chosen number lets choose the highest possible number within the given range which is 10

so i choose 10
